description: User Scenarios + Documentation + Final Integration Stress Test. Create example scenarios with validation scripts, comprehensive docs, and a stress test that runs 100 rapid iterations to verify no memory leaks or unbounded growth.
steps: Create examples/ directory at project root
Create examples/todo_app/goal.md with goal text 'Build a Python Flask todo app with REST API and SQLite'
Create examples/todo_app/run.sh that invokes runner.py with the goal in dry-run mode and validates output
Create examples/cli_tool/goal.md with goal 'Build a CLI file organizer that sorts files by extension'
Create examples/api_service/goal.md with goal 'Build a FastAPI microservice with JWT auth'
Create examples/validate_all.sh that runs all example run.sh scripts and reports pass/fail
Create docs/ directory at project root
Create docs/architecture.md - system architecture doc covering: graph executor, evolution engine, feedback loop, state manager, knowledge store, context assembler, skill selector
Create docs/api-reference.md - Web API documentation for all endpoints with request/response examples
Create docs/evolution-guide.md - How self-evolution works: reflection -> proposal -> validation -> application -> metrics -> revert-if-worse

Create tests/test_stress.py with a stress test that: (a) runs 100 rapid iterations of the feedback loop with randomized success/failure data, (b) verifies reflections.jsonl doesn't grow beyond pruning threshold, (c) verifies evolution history.jsonl gets auto-pruned at 500 entries, (d) verifies no unbounded list growth in state dict (errors, progress_history capped), (e) verifies metrics window doesn't exceed configured size, (f) mark with @pytest.mark.slow
Create tests/test_examples.py that runs each example's run.sh in subprocess and verifies exit code 0
acceptance_criteria: All 3 example run.sh scripts execute without error in dry-run mode
docs/ contains architecture.md, api-reference.md, evolution-guide.md with substantive content
Stress test passes - 100 iterations complete without memory issues or unbounded growth
All tests pass: python -m pytest tests/ --cov --cov-fail-under=90 -q
Final total test count significantly higher than 894
findings: All 1018 tests pass (23 new: 12 in test_examples.py, 11 in test_stress.py). Coverage 98.52%. Stress tests validated: metrics window bounded at 10, historian prunes at 500, errors capped at 10, progress_history capped at 20. Note: historian stick_rate can be negative when reverted > applied (not a bug). All 3 example scenarios pass dry-run. Docs all exceed 500 words.
